# ARTIDOM — Custom Furniture Workshop in Montenegro

> Custom kitchens, wardrobes and built-in furniture for apartments and villas in Montenegro.

Artidom DOO is a furniture workshop in Sutomore, Bar, Montenegro. We design, produce and install custom kitchens, wardrobes, walk-in closets and bathroom furniture. Our 300 m² production facility serves residential clients across Montenegro — Bar, Budva, Podgorica, Tivat, Kotor. Selected HoReCa and B2B projects on request.

## Services

- Custom kitchens (кухни на заказ / kuhinje po mjeri)
- Fitted wardrobes and walk-in closets (шкафы и гардеробные / plakari po mjeri)
- Bathroom furniture (мебель для ванной / kupatilski namještaj)
- Apartment furnishing packages
- Selected HoReCa and B2B fit-outs

## Key Facts

- Workshop: 300 m² in Sutomore, Bar, Montenegro
- Team: 40 craftsmen
- Lead time: 3–5 weeks typical
- CNC cutting + hand finishing
- European-grade materials (oak, veneer, lacquered MDF, stone tops)
- Measurement and installation across Montenegro

## Contact

- Website: https://artidom.art
- Email: director@a-96.ru
- Phone: +382 68 282 371
- Address: Mirošica 2, Sutomore, 85000 Bar, Montenegro

## Languages

- Serbian (default): /sr/
- English: /en/
- Russian: /ru/

---

## Detailed Services

### Custom Kitchens
Fitted kitchens designed around your floor plan and wall geometry. We build kitchen lines, L-shapes, U-shapes and island layouts. Integrated appliances, upper storage, soft-close mechanisms, built-in lighting. Materials range from lacquered MDF with compact worktops to oak veneer with stone tops. Suitable for apartments, villas and furnished rental properties. Lead time: 4-6 weeks.

### Fitted Wardrobes and Walk-in Closets
Wall-to-wall and floor-to-ceiling wardrobe systems. Built to the exact room dimensions — no gaps, no fillers. Internal layout includes hanging rails, shelves, drawers, shoe racks and accessories zones. Sliding or hinged doors in matte lacquer, oak veneer or mirror finish. Walk-in closets with open shelving and integrated lighting. Lead time: 3-5 weeks.

### Bathroom Furniture
Custom vanity units, mirror cabinets, tall storage columns and shelving for bathrooms. Moisture-resistant materials and finishes. Built to fit around plumbing and wall niches. Available in lacquered MDF, veneer or laminate. Lead time: 3-4 weeks.

### Apartment Furnishing Packages
Complete furniture sets for apartments and villas: kitchen + wardrobes + entry storage + bathroom furniture in a single order. One measurement visit, one production run, one installation. Reduces total lead time and cost compared to ordering each piece separately. Popular with property developers and rental investors.

### HoReCa and B2B Fit-outs
Custom counters, reception desks, service points and front-of-house joinery for restaurants, cafes, hotels, schools and offices. Taken on a selective basis. Previous projects include a 1,200 m² school facility (40 furniture units) and multiple restaurant counter installations across the Balkans.

---

## Process

### 1. Brief and Measurement
You describe what you need. We visit the property, take measurements and discuss materials, layout and budget. Free of charge within Bar municipality; travel fee applies for other cities.

### 2. Design and Estimate
We produce technical drawings (2D layouts, section views) and a detailed cost estimate. You review, adjust and approve before production starts. Typical turnaround: 3-5 working days.

### 3. Production
Furniture is produced in our 300 m² workshop in Sutomore. CNC cutting for precision, hand finishing for quality. All fittings and hardware are European-grade. Production time: 3-6 weeks depending on complexity.

### 4. Delivery and Installation
We deliver and install at your property. Installation includes leveling, fitting, adjustment of doors and drawers, and cleanup. Installation time: 1-3 days for a typical kitchen or wardrobe set.

---

## Materials

- Oak and veneer: European suppliers, natural oak and oak veneer panels for fronts and visible surfaces
- Lacquered MDF: Matte and semi-matte finishes in any RAL colour, scratch-resistant lacquer
- Compact and stone worktops: Compact laminate (12 mm) for kitchens and bathrooms; natural and engineered stone tops available on request
- Hardware: Blum, Hettich and equivalent European-grade soft-close hinges, drawer systems and sliding mechanisms
- Edge banding: Laser-edge technology for seamless front surfaces
- All boards are E1-class (low formaldehyde emission), sourced from EU suppliers

---

## Coverage

Artidom serves clients across Montenegro:

- Bar and Sutomore — local area, no travel fee
- Budva — 40 min drive, frequent projects
- Podgorica — 1 hour drive, regular service
- Tivat — 1.5 hours, Lustica Bay and Porto Montenegro area
- Kotor — 1.5 hours, Old Town and Dobrota area
- Herceg Novi — 2 hours, available on request
- Other locations in Montenegro — available on request with travel fee

---

## FAQ

### English

Q: Where to order custom furniture in Montenegro?
A: Artidom is a furniture workshop in Sutomore, Bar, Montenegro. We produce custom kitchens, wardrobes, walk-in closets and bathroom furniture in our own 300 m² facility. We serve clients across Montenegro including Bar, Budva, Podgorica, Tivat and Kotor. Contact us at +382 68 282 371 or director@a-96.ru.

Q: How much does a custom kitchen cost in Montenegro?
A: The price depends on the size, materials, complexity of the layout and choice of worktop. A compact apartment kitchen in lacquered MDF with a compact worktop starts from a lower range; a full oak veneer kitchen with a stone top costs more. We provide a detailed cost estimate after measurement and design approval — no hidden fees.

Q: How long does custom furniture take in Montenegro?
A: Typical lead time is 3-5 weeks from design approval to installation. Kitchens take 4-6 weeks, wardrobes 3-5 weeks, bathroom furniture 3-4 weeks. Complex projects or large apartment packages may take longer. We confirm the exact timeline before production starts.

### Русский

Q: Где заказать мебель на заказ в Черногории?
A: Artidom — мебельная мастерская в Сутоморе (Бар, Черногория). Производим кухни на заказ, шкафы-купе, гардеробные и мебель для ванных комнат на собственном производстве площадью 300 м². Работаем по всей Черногории: Бар, Будва, Подгорица, Тиват, Котор. Телефон: +382 68 282 371, email: director@a-96.ru.

Q: Сколько стоит кухня на заказ в Черногории?
A: Цена зависит от размера кухни, выбранных материалов, сложности планировки и типа столешницы. Компактная кухня из лакированного МДФ с компакт-столешницей — бюджетный вариант; кухня из дубового шпона с каменной столешницей — дороже. После замера и утверждения проекта мы предоставляем детальную смету без скрытых доплат.

Q: Сколько времени занимает изготовление мебели?
A: Стандартный срок — 3-5 недель от утверждения проекта до установки. Кухни: 4-6 недель, шкафы: 3-5 недель, мебель для ванной: 3-4 недели. Для крупных заказов (меблировка всей квартиры) сроки могут быть больше. Точные сроки фиксируем до начала производства.

### Srpski

Q: Koliko košta kuhinja po mjeri u Crnoj Gori?
A: Cijena zavisi od veličine kuhinje, izbora materijala, složenosti rasporeda i vrste radne ploče. Kompaktna kuhinja od lakiranog MDF-a sa kompakt radnom pločom je pristupačnija opcija; kuhinja od hrastovog furnira sa kamenom pločom košta više. Nakon mjerenja i odobrenja projekta dajemo detaljan predračun bez skrivenih troškova.

Q: Koliko traje izrada namještaja po mjeri?
A: Standardni rok je 3-5 nedjelja od odobrenja projekta do ugradnje. Kuhinje: 4-6 nedjelja, plakari: 3-5 nedjelja, kupatilski namještaj: 3-4 nedjelje. Za veće narudžbe (opremanje cijelog stana) rokovi mogu biti duži. Tačne rokove utvrđujemo prije početka proizvodnje.

---

## E-E-A-T: Why Trust Artidom

- Own production facility: 300 m² workshop in Sutomore, Bar — not a reseller or broker
- Team of 40 craftsmen with hands-on woodworking and CNC experience
- Real completed projects: apartments in Bar and Budva, a 1,200 m² school in Montenegro, HoReCa counters across the Balkans
- CNC precision cutting combined with hand finishing for quality control
- European-grade materials from verified EU suppliers (E1-class boards, Blum/Hettich hardware)
- Registered company: Artidom DOO, Tax ID 03505464, Bar, Montenegro
- Direct communication with the workshop — no intermediaries, no outsourced production
